item.title: Ukrainians react to massive attack as Russia and Ukraine hold talks in Geneva
item.description: Ukraine sent negotiators to Geneva, Switzerland, to hold talks with their Russian counterparts as the war rages on. CBS News' Holly Williams and Elean...

item.title: Warner Bros. Discovery restarts takeover talks with Paramount Skydance
item.description: Warner Bros. Discovery said that Paramount Skydance is considering enhancing its buyout offer for the entertainment company.

item.title: Jesse Jackson's civil rights legacy
item.description: Civil rights activist Rev. Jesse Jackson, who marched with Martin Luther King Jr., died at 84, his family said. Antjuan Seawright, a Democratic strate...

item.title: Russia and Ukraine set to hold talks in Geneva as another attack rocks thousands of Ukrainians
item.description: Russian and Ukrainian officials are set to hold talks in Geneva on Tuesday. This comes as thousands of Ukrainians were impacted by a Russian attack ov...

item.title: Historian chronicles how debates that define U.S. history can help us navigate today's politics
item.description: Jon Meacham, a historian and bestselling author, discusses the state of American politics, what we can learn from U.S. history, and his latest book, "...
